nav.searchPlaceholder: Search Complaint ID, Tracking ID, or Issue Title...

hero.title: Civic Resolve
hero.subtitle: Citizen Issue Resolution & Governance Platform
hero.description: A modern, transparent GovTech platform enabling citizens to report local civic issues, support nearby complaints to eliminate duplication, and track resolutions through transparent workflows. Join your community to actively participate in building better civic services.

capabilities.title: Platform Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Select a profile workspace to discover role-specific features and governance tools.

citizen.hero: Report civic issues in your community. Support nearby issues. Track resolution transparently. Earn badges and civic recognition.
citizen.f1Desc: Select coordinates on a map, upload incident photos, and get AI-assisted category & priority suggestions.
citizen.f2Desc: Support unresolved local reports with a single click to prevent duplicates and boost municipal urgency.
citizen.f3Desc: Monitor complaint stages from Submitted to Closed with a visual, public incident timeline.
citizen.f4Desc: Earn reputation points (XP) and unlock prestigious digital badges like Civic Champion.
citizen.f5Desc: Browse a geographic distribution of local civic concerns on an interactive community Leaflet map.
citizen.benefit: Your participation helps improve civic services.

officer.hero: Manage assigned complaints efficiently. Update issue progress. Resolve community problems faster. Generate departmental reports.
officer.f1Desc: Access a filtered productivity queue of municipal complaints assigned directly to your profile.
officer.f2Desc: Transition ticket progress statuses from Under Review to Resolved and upload post-resolution proof photos.
officer.f3Desc: Pinpoint assigned tickets and identify localized hot spots geographically on department heatmaps.
officer.f4Desc: Track department completion rates, pending issues, and resolution speed indexes.
officer.f5Desc: Export workload lists, dates, and citizen descriptions for administrative audits.
officer.benefit: Improve service delivery and reduce complaint resolution time.

admin.hero: Manage city-wide operations. Monitor departments. Track escalations. Analyze governance performance.
admin.f1Desc: Register active head officers, modify description logs, or toggle departments' active statuses.
admin.f2Desc: Add officer accounts, assign divisions, reset passwords, or toggle suspension states.
admin.f3Desc: Oversee automatic 15-day warning or 30-day critical breaches and unassigned SLA alerts.
admin.f4Desc: Evaluate city overview metrics, resolution distributions, and category statistic charts.
admin.f5Desc: Audit an immutable historical list of administrative actions, config edits, and SLA escalations.
admin.benefit: Complete visibility into municipal operations and governance metrics.

workflow.title: How Civic Resolve Operates
workflow.subtitle: A transparent workflow showing every step from initial reporting to resolution.
workflow.step1Desc: Select coordinates, upload photo hazard details, and submit complaint.
workflow.step2Desc: AI-assisted priority suggestions and category mapping direct the complaint to the correct department queue.
workflow.step3Desc: The assigned officer inspects the site, moves status to in-progress, and resolves the issue.
workflow.step4Desc: Citizen receives notification with resolution notes and images. XP points are awarded.

benefits.title: Municipal & Citizen Benefits
benefits.subtitle: Designed for municipal departments to handle complaints efficiently, and for citizens to feel their voice is valued.
benefits.item1: Reduce administrative delays by up to 40% with automated category checks
benefits.item2: Eliminate redundant tasks through local upvote and support maps
benefits.item3: Transparent timeline logs prevent complaint neglect and index delays
benefits.item4: Excel/PDF analytics reporting helps administrative audits
benefits.disclaimer: * Simulated demonstration metrics for municipal activity tracking.
benefits.citizenBenefit1: Report local hazards in under 60 seconds
benefits.citizenBenefit2: Upvote nearby complaints to highlight urgency
benefits.citizenBenefit3: Track resolution stages on a public timeline
benefits.citizenBenefit4: Earn reputation points and unlock civic badges
benefits.officerBenefit1: Access a filtered personal workload queue
benefits.officerBenefit2: Transition ticket statuses and upload proof photos
benefits.officerBenefit3: Identify departmental hot spots on interactive maps
benefits.officerBenefit4: Export workload reports for administrative audits
benefits.adminBenefit1: Manage head officers and department configurations
benefits.adminBenefit2: Oversee automated SLA warnings and unassigned alerts
benefits.adminBenefit3: Evaluate city-wide operations and compliance metrics
benefits.adminBenefit4: Audit historical administrative logs and logs registry

footer.subtitle: Citizen Issue Resolution & Governance Platform
footer.copy: Civic Resolve. Municipal Technology. All rights reserved.

validation.allRequired: All fields are required for registration.
validation.enterCredentials: Please enter both email and password.
validation.demoFailed: Demo access failed. Please try again.

dashboard.reportDesc: Potholes, leakage, waste, streetlights or animal control.
dashboard.nearbyDesc: Browse active reports and support issues near you.
dashboard.rewardsDesc: Check achievements, points, and unlock special badges.
dashboard.noIssuesDesc: You haven't reported any public issues yet. Make a difference by reporting infrastructure or utility issues in your community.

nearby.title: Nearby Civic Issues
nearby.subtitle: Discover unresolved issues reported around your neighborhood. Support them to boost priority and urgency.
nearby.searchPlaceholder: Search by Tracking ID, Title, or Category...
nearby.emptyStateDesc: There are no unresolved complaints reported in this area yet.
nearby.proximityAlertDesc: There are {count} active unresolved issues within 100 meters of your location. Please review nearby tickets.
nearby.noIssuesRadius: No issues reported within {radius}km of your location.

report.title: Report a Public Issue
report.subtitle: Provide details and tag the location on the map to alert the municipal department.
report.bannerDesc: Before creating a new complaint, review nearby reported issues in your area. A similar issue may already exist. Supporting an existing issue helps prevent duplicate reports and increases community visibility and priority.
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide exact details of the public issue. Include landmarks if any...
report.uploadDesc: Click or drag images to upload (Max 5 files)
report.locationDesc: Click on the map to place a pin directly at the hazard site.

myComplaints.title: My Registered Complaints
myComplaints.subtitle: Track timelines, read AI-assisted summaries, and export PDFs of your submitted complaints.
myComplaints.emptyStateDesc: You haven't filed any complaints yet. Start helping your community by filing your first complaint.

supported.title: Supported Issues
supported.subtitle: Issues reported by other citizens that you have supported to boost priority.
supported.emptyStateDesc: You haven't supported any public issues yet. Browse nearby issues and back other citizens' concerns to help them get prioritized.

rewards.title: Citizen Rewards & Badges
rewards.subtitle: Unlock digital achievements, earn XP multipliers, and track your gamification parameters.
rewards.multiplierDesc: Strengthen community services! Reports earn 20 XP (+50 bonus on 1st), supporting upvotes earn 5 XP, and resolutions earn 30 XP!

notifications.title: Notifications Inbox
notifications.subtitle: Read in-app alert communications and ticket updates.
notifications.emptyStateDesc: You don't have any notifications right now. We will keep you updated on your reported issues and earned rewards.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage account information, system preferences, and review digital achievements.
profile.noBadges: No digital badges unlocked yet. Start reporting complaints to earn rewards!

map.title: Public Issues Map
map.subtitle: Interact with the city map to review open and resolved complaints in all departments.
